description: The MigrationDialog component is used to collect information on what migration action should be done for transfering content from other platforms or other Resonite accounts.

fields._usernameField: The username of the account to transfer from.
fields._passwordField: The password of the account to transfer from.
fields._migrateFavorites: Whether to migrate favorites from the account or not.
fields._overwriteFavorites: Whether to replace the favorites on the currently logged in account with the transfering from account.
fields._preserveOldHome: Whether to keep the home world setting from the other account or create a new default home.
fields._migrateContacts: Whether to migrate contacts from the account or not.
fields._migrateMessageHistory: Whether to migrate message history from the account or not.
fields._migrateRecords: Whether to migrate items, worlds, avatars, message items, or other objects/data from the account or not.
fields._migrateCloudVariables: Whether to migrate cloud variables made by the account or not.
fields._migratedCloudVariableDefinitions: Whether to migrate values defined for other user's variables from the account or not.
fields._migrateGroups: Whether to migrate groups from the account or not.
fields._groupsRoot: The root of the groups section.
fields._groupsMessage: The text element for groups dialog.
fields._loadGroupsButton: The button for loading groups in.
fields.CurrentState: The current state of the migration dialog visual.
fields._swapRegion: Thw region used for animation when switching between different screens in the migration dialog

methods.SetOverwrite: Called when the overwrite button is touched.
methods.SetPreserveHome: Called when the preserve home button is touched.
methods.ChooseAllData: Called when the choose all data button is touched.
methods.ChangeStep: Called when the change step button is touched.
methods.SaveGroupSelectionAndChange: Called when the save group selection and change button is touched.
methods.CheckLoginAndNext: Called when the Check login and next button is touched.
methods.LoadGroupsPressed: Called when the load groups button is touched.
methods.OnSourceSelected: Called when the source button is touched.
methods.StartMigrationPressed: Called when the start migration button is touched.
methods.CancelPressed: Called when the cancel button is touched.
